steps.title: Apply the density formula
steps.content: Density is mass divided by volume. With mass = 180 grams and volume = 30 cubic centimeters: $$\text{density} = \frac{180}{30}$$

steps.title: Simplify to find density
steps.content: Divide 180 by 30. Since $30 \times 6 = 180$, we have $$\frac{180}{30} = 6$$. The density is 6 grams per cubic centimeter. That matches Choice A — $6$.
